# AI Agent Comparisons

A focused directory of Super personal AI agent market research, news analysis, comparisons, and use cases.

## Pages
- [Knowledge Distillation Lab: Temperature, Soft Targets, and Student Capacity](knowledge-distillation-soft-targets-lab-20260711-202507/): Knowledge Distillation Lab
- [BatchNorm Lab: Training Batches vs Running Statistics](batchnorm-train-eval-running-statistics-lab-20260711-012613/): BatchNorm Running Statistics Lab
- [AdamW Lab: Decoupled Weight Decay vs L2](adamw-decoupled-weight-decay-lab-20260710-235510/): AdamW Weight Decay Lab
